title: AI Could Delete EVERYTHING! Businesses Ignored This! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof discusses overlooked security threats posed by agentic AI, highlighting prompt injection, data deletion risks, and unauthorized actions as reasons businesses remain hesitant to deploy such systems despite their potential.
writeup: Cyril Imhof outlines security threats that agentic AI introduces and that businesses have largely overlooked: prompt injection, unauthorized data deletion, and unintended actions taken by autonomous agents. The argument is that these unaddressed risks explain why organizations hesitate to adopt agentic systems despite their potential. The takeaway is that agent autonomy carries operational dangers (such as destructive or unauthorized actions) that warrant attention before deployment.
